sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The game is over after just one UP action. Let me inspect what happened - the blue bar moved UP and seems to have split or the red block appeared below it. Let me check the current state.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['b', 'R']:
        boundary = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in boundary]
        cols = [p[1] for p in boundary]
        print(f"Color={n['color']}, rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={n['pixels']}, id={n['id']}")
print(f"Step: {current_frame.step}, Level: {current_frame.level}")
print(f"Game over: {last_action_result.get('game_over')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
